user: Which manager is weakest and what should we do?

finding.title: Weak Manager Findings
finding.exec_summary: Rocco Neubert (East region) has the weakest performance as measured by the lowest win_rate of 0.6208 (62.1%). His KPI evidence is: closed_deals = 1113, won_deals = 691, won_revenue = 1960545.0, avg_cycle_days_closed = 45.8428. To address this, implement targeted coaching, review deal‑qualification and pipeline processes, and set clear performance improvement targets.
